source: Library of Congress, Prints & Photographs Division — Panoramic Photograph Collection
license: No known restrictions on publication (public domain — pre-1928)
title: Juneau, Alaska, 1914
description: 1914 panoramic photograph of Juneau from above the town showing the full sweep of Gastineau Channel, the compact downtown grid, and the early waterfront with wooden wharves. The Chilkat Range is visible across the channel.
alt: 1914 panoramic photograph of Juneau, Alaska from above showing downtown, waterfront, and Gastineau Channel
